claimText: Satellite internet typically experiences higher latency than traditional wired broadband connections due to the physical distance data must travel to and from orbit.
evidenceExcerpt: Satellite internet typically has higher latency compared to traditional wired connections due to the distance data must travel.
examUse: Statement-based question comparing latency of satellite internet vs. optical fiber/wired connections.
distractorHooks: Satellite internet has lower latency than wired connections
Latency is unaffected by the distance to orbit

claimText: Project Kuiper is a satellite internet project launched by Amazon.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching satellite internet projects with their parent companies.

claimText: OneWeb is a satellite internet project operated by the French satellite operator Eutelsat.
evidenceExcerpt: OneWeb: By French satellite operator Eutelsat
examUse: Correct-pair question matching satellite internet projects with their parent companies.
distractorHooks: OneWeb is a Chinese state-owned enterprise

claimText: The Qianfan constellation is a planned Chinese low-Earth orbit (LEO) satellite internet megaconstellation.
evidenceExcerpt: Qianfan constellation: Planned Chinese low-Earth orbit satellite internet megaconstellation.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching satellite constellations with their respective countries of origin.
distractorHooks: Qianfan is a Japanese lunar mission
Qianfan is an Indian navigation satellite system

claimText: The infrastructure of satellite internet relies on both a Space Segment, consisting of satellite constellations, and a Ground Segment, which includes gateway stations and control networks.
evidenceExcerpt: Infrastructure: Generally includes three segments: Space Segment: It is mainly a constellation system... Ground segment: Includes satellite measurement and control networks, gateway stations, etc.
examUse: Statement-based question on the components required for satellite internet functionality.
distractorHooks: Satellite internet operates entirely in space without ground infrastructure
Gateway stations are part of the space segment
